checks.name: pipeline_contract_integration_default_engine_policy
checks.note: Acceptance evidence must preserve the pipeline-contract integration engine policy guard.

checks.name: pipeline_contract_stack_engine_runtime_default
checks.note: Acceptance evidence must preserve the pipeline-contract StackEngine runtime-default path.

clean_room.note: Acceptance audit consumes GLASS artifacts and user-generated PixInsight/WBPP black-box timing/output metadata only.

exception_context.note: No rejected or zero-weight frame exceptions were recorded.

checks.name: integration_default_engine_policy
checks.note: Non-resident integration must default to StackEngine unless the CUDA fast path is explicitly requested.

checks.name: stack_engine_runtime_default_path
checks.note: Runtime artifacts must preserve StackEngine master calibration and StackEngine/resident integration defaults.

checks.name: integration_stack_result_contract
checks.note: CPU StackEngine integration outputs must carry an embedded passing result contract.

checks.name: integration_resident_result_contract
checks.note: Resident CUDA integration outputs must satisfy the resident result-contract audit.

checks.name: integration_sample_accounting_closure
checks.note: Sample-closure evidence is optional for old artifacts, but explicit failed closure blocks the pipeline contract.

checks.name: calibration_master_surface_contract
checks.note: Master calibration surfaces must expose stats, semantics, and StackEngine result contracts.

checks.name: resident_calibration_surface_contract
checks.note: Resident CUDA calibration surfaces must pass their resident calibration contract.

checks.name: calibrated_light_dq_contract
checks.note: Calibrated light records must carry a calibrated image path, DQ map path, DQ summary, and tile metadata.

checks.name: integration_rejection_sample_counts_match_maps
checks.note: Rejection maps count samples; DQ rejection flags count touched pixels.

checks.name: local_normalization_contract
checks.note: LN rows must record crop_box and DQ state; enabled LN rows must record coefficient grids.

checks.name: local_normalization_continuous_contract_audit
checks.note: Attached LN continuous coefficient-field audit must pass before run-level acceptance.

sample_accounting_closure.semantics: Initial valid input samples close over final valid samples plus low/high rejected samples. Invalid input samples are not rejection samples.

rejection_sample_accounting.semantics: Low/high rejection count maps store rejected-sample counts; DQ low/high flags store pixels touched by rejection.

rows.semantics: Low/high rejection count maps store rejected-sample counts; DQ low/high flags store pixels touched by rejection.

runtime_default.semantics: Master calibration surfaces must use StackEngine CPU or resident CUDA calibration contracts. Non-resident integration defaults to StackEngine CPU; the older CUDA streaming accumulator remains acceptable only when explicitly requested and recorded by integration_engine_policy.

rows.semantics: Initial valid input samples close over final valid samples plus low/high rejected samples. Invalid input samples are not rejection samples.

stack_engine_runtime_default.semantics: Master calibration surfaces must use StackEngine CPU or resident CUDA calibration contracts. Non-resident integration defaults to StackEngine CPU; the older CUDA streaming accumulator remains acceptable only when explicitly requested and recorded by integration_engine_policy.

checks.name: pipeline_contract_integration_default_engine_policy
checks.note: Acceptance evidence must preserve the pipeline-contract integration engine policy guard.

checks.name: pipeline_contract_stack_engine_runtime_default
checks.note: Acceptance evidence must preserve the pipeline-contract StackEngine runtime-default path.

rows.semantics: Low/high rejection count maps store rejected-sample counts; DQ low/high flags store pixels touched by rejection.

runtime_default.semantics: Master calibration surfaces must use StackEngine CPU or resident CUDA calibration contracts. Non-resident integration defaults to StackEngine CPU; the older CUDA streaming accumulator remains acceptable only when explicitly requested and recorded by integration_engine_policy.

rows.semantics: Initial valid input samples close over final valid samples plus low/high rejected samples. Invalid input samples are not rejection samples.

clean_room.note: This summary uses GLASS artifacts and user-generated PixInsight/WBPP black-box timing/output metadata only. It does not use PixInsight/WBPP implementation source.
